series_metadata.series_title: Adjudication Orders issued under non-119 Complaint Resolution Rules.
series_metadata.series_description: Adjudication Orders signed by the Director and related Reports and Recommendations to the Director regarding appeals under non-119 complaint resolution rules, including OAC 5123:2-17-01 and 5123-4-04.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Maintain scanned and saved electronically ; Electronic: Maintain from date of Adjudication Order
